docs.title: Who am I?
docs.text: Just a fellow homo-sapien trying to spread the outcomes that arise as a result of the energy flow happening in the least understood part of the human body.

docs.title: What am I doing now?
docs.text: Trying to fill boredom and frustration by sharing my knowledge to the wider audience - in the hopes of changing a few lives...LoL

docs.title: What will you get from here?
docs.text:
TBH, I don't know - I'm going to maintain this as a personal diary (with not so personal details, of course) I'm planning to share what I'm seen, heard, experienced, felt - during my 26 years of life on this planet If any of those resonate with you - please write to me!

I strongly believe that you can learn something from anyone and everyone in this world! So, let's connect and exchange ideas!

docs.title: Hi, I'm Sabesh! 👋
docs.text: I'm based in Delft, Netherlands. This site is my personal knowledge log — covering careers, networking, life experiences, and more.

docs.title: Career
docs.text: Welcome to my career section. Here I share insights on the job market, career choices, and lessons learned along the way.

docs.title: Life
docs.text:
Welcome to my Life. Here I talk about what I feel like - anything in between, but not limited to, are we living inside a matrix to is astrology real?.

These are my personal opinions Read further on your own risk I'm always open to have a healthy dialogue about anything that you see here!!

docs.title: Art of Networking
docs.text: Welcome to my version on the "Art of Networking". What will go here - TBD
